layout: IMPORTANT: output a PNG image. Match the attached reference sprite sheet EXACTLY in grid layout: 1024×1024 pixel art, 5 rows × 8 columns. Row 0: walk SOUTH 4 frames then walk SOUTHWEST 4 frames. Row 1: walk WEST 4 frames then walk NORTHWEST 4 frames. Row 2: walk NORTH 4 frames then walk NORTHEAST 4 frames. Row 3: walk EAST 4 frames then walk SOUTHEAST 4 frames. Row 4: IDLE 4 frames centered (cols 3–6). Each character faces the correct direction per row label. Plain white background only. Chibi pixel art, same scale and frame spacing as reference.
